proven.claim: PROVEN: getGeneratorNames().join(", ") always produces a string — join() is total over arrays
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 133
; PROVEN: getGeneratorNames().join(", ") always produces a string — join() is total over arrays
(declare-const names_array_is_defined Int)  ; 1 = getGeneratorNames() returns a value (not throws)
(declare-const join_result_is_string Int)   ; 1 = join() returned a string value
; Code transition: TypeScript return type of getGeneratorNames() is string[]
; a typed method cannot return undefined without a type error under strict mode
(assert (= names_array_is_defined 1))
; Code transition: Array.prototype.join is defined for all arrays including []
; join([]) = "", join(["a","b"]) = "a, b" — never throws, always returns string
(assert (=> (= names_array_is_defined 1) (= join_result_is_string 1)))
; Negation: join throws or returns non-string
(assert (= join_result_is_string 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: if createDefault() registers 0 generators, join("") → "Signals: " (degenerate empty)
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 133
; VIOLATION: if createDefault() registers 0 generators, join("") → "Signals: " (degenerate empty)
(declare-const default_generator_count Int)    ; generators registered by createDefault()
(declare-const llm_signals_flag Int)           ; 1 = --llm-signals in args
(declare-const total_generator_count Int)      ; total after buildSignalRegistry completes
(declare-const signals_output_length Int)      ; byte length of the join result
; Code transition: buildSignalRegistry calls SignalRegistry.createDefault()
; count is non-negative (registry can hold 0 generators)
(assert (>= default_generator_count 0))
; Code transition: --llm-signals absent → no additional generator registered
(assert (= llm_signals_flag 0))
(assert (= total_generator_count default_generator_count))
; Code transition: join([]) = "" when generator_count = 0
(assert (= default_generator_count 0))
(assert (=> (= total_generator_count 0) (= signals_output_length 0)))
; Degenerate: log prints "Signals: " — empty string where signal names are expected
(assert (= signals_output_length 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: buildSignalRegistry passes unvalidated model to LLMSignalGenerator
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 133
; VIOLATION: buildSignalRegistry passes unvalidated model to LLMSignalGenerator
; when --llm-signals set and --signal-model absent, llmModel falls back to model (unchecked)
(declare-const llm_signals_flag Int)          ; 1 = --llm-signals in args
(declare-const signal_model_flag_present Int) ; 1 = --signal-model in args
(declare-const model_is_valid Int)            ; 1 = model is a recognized model name
(declare-const llm_generator_model_valid Int) ; 1 = LLMSignalGenerator receives valid model
; Code transition: --llm-signals set, --signal-model absent → getFlag returns undefined
; Code transition: undefined || model fires → llmModel = model (unvalidated, from line 132)
(assert (= llm_signals_flag 1))
(assert (= signal_model_flag_present 0))
(assert (= model_is_valid 0))               ; caller passed invalid --model (P3 violation above)
; Code transition: llmModel = model → LLMSignalGenerator({model: llmModel}) uses bad value
(assert (=> (and (= llm_signals_flag 1) (= signal_model_flag_present 0))
            (= llm_generator_model_valid model_is_valid)))
; Violation: LLMSignalGenerator precondition (valid model name) is not established
(assert (= llm_generator_model_valid 0))
(check-sat)
